description: web.xml servlet routing + directly addressable JSP. Each <servlet-mapping> url-pattern (including multiple patterns and CDATA-wrapped values) yields one ANY/servlet/webxml route; handler is the <servlet-class> FQN or the <jsp-file> path; DispatcherServlet carries a dispatcher note. url-pattern values are kept verbatim (extension and prefix patterns unchanged). Commented-out mappings are ignored. JSP files under webapp (but not WEB-INF) are GET/page/jsp routes addressable at their webapp-relative path.
